log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, possibly a spreader with overlay capabilities, and has been detected by multiple sandboxes. I should investigate the network activity to understand its communication b
The sample communicates with two IP addresses over HTTPS (184.168.131.241 and 23.227.38.32) and performs DNS lookups for two domains. I should investigate the registry changes to see if there are any
There are no persistence keys found in the registry changes, so I should investigate the process activity to understand the sample's behavior and any potential TTPs.
The sample creates a copy of itself in the temporary directory and loads various Windows modules, which could be used for lateral movement or data exfiltration. I should investigate the dropped files
